text_chunk: Moderate coffee consumption is associated with a lower risk of heart disease, while drinking very large amounts of coffee may increase blood pressure.
true_claims: Moderate coffee consumption is associated with a lower risk of heart disease.
Drinking very large amounts of coffee may increase blood pressure.

text_chunk: Red stop signs are easier for drivers to see than yellow ones because the color red has higher contrast in most environments.
true_claims: Red stop signs are easier for drivers to see than yellow ones.
The color red has higher contrast than yellow in most environments.

text_chunk: A standard stop sign has an octagonal shape and is used to instruct drivers to come to a complete stop at intersections.
true_claims: A standard stop sign has an octagonal shape.
A stop sign is used to instruct drivers to come to a complete stop at intersections.
